text:
Theo Magath is a teacher at the Marley Academy.

Appearance

Magath is an older man with light eyes and a thin beard, mustache, and short thinning hair. He has visible wrinkles from age but has an overall healthy build and appearance. Like his fellow soldiers, he wears the standard Marleyan soldier uniform consisting of a light jacket and pants with a black clip at the collar, supply packs on the hip, suspender straps, a hard hat with a black stripe around it, and tall combat boots.

Personality

Story

Magath is the teacher for the external students which are considered "demons" in Marley Academy. He treats the external students badly by making their classroom outside of the building and purposefully puts adhesive on their desks which forces them to be stuck to their desks. 

He also introduces the external students to a new classmate, which is a titan. As he found out that Ymir ask their friends for help, he tied up the external students and imprisoned them in a closet. He confronted the Shingeki High students after they pass through the 9 traps and show the 4 students ready to confront the intruders. However, he is shocked that intruders are blissful of the current situation and talking with each other.
